extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC Primoz attacked on the descent of the final climb to win the stage and jump Froome into third overall, while Thomas controlled all attacks.
tactical_patterns: LANDA Mikel attacked solo on Tourmalet over 100km from finish, gained 3min but isolated without Valverde/Quintana support.
ROGLIC benefited from DUMOULIN attacking ahead of him, using Dutch teammate attacks to mask his own move.
CROISWIJK counterattack on descent neutralized LANDA's long-range move more effectively than tempo riding.
LATOUR survived 50km solo time-trial effort after being dropped early, defending white jersey through time-trialing strength not climbing.

rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: responded to every attack with mouth closed, never showing strain despite multiple accelerations
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: neutral: showed willingness to attack 100km+ out but Movistar lacked numbers when Valverde/Quintana dropped
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: negative: attacked multiple times but inadvertently set up Roglic by opening gaps without distancing him
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: combined daredevil descending with tactical patience sitting behind Dumoulin's attacks before launching own move
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: dropped from 5th to outside top-10, previous day's crash injury clearly compromised climbing
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: positive: rode for Thomas domestique duty at 21 while challenging for white jersey, future Grand Tour winner
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: clinched KOM with 79pt margin, won stages in both Alps and Pyrenees showing versatile climbing/descending
